calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution And For Settlement Of The First And Final Account
Off Calendar Feb-02-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution And For Settlement Of The First And Final Account
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Continued To Feb-02-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ed Koplowitz on behalf of Debra Dolch.

Mr. Koplowitz stated that attorneys Bachrach and Young would not be appearing and that he had authorization to speak on their behalf. In addition, he reported that they had worked out the objections, that a contractual settlement between the parties was out, and that the only change in the petition would be in regard to Debra Dolch's fees. The Court ordered Mr. Koplowitz to file an amended petition which is to be heard on February 2, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Karen Farnsworth, CSR#5162. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Aquino.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution And For Settlement Of The First And Final Account
Off Calendar Dec-17-2008 Continued To Dec-31-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution And For Settlement Of The First And Final Account
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Continued To Dec-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marilyn Young for Julie Talcott. Edward Koplowitz and Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

The Parties agreed to have the matter continued for 120 days. Mr. Koplowitz stated that mediation was not successful and that discovery needed to be conducted. The matter was continued to December 3, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Leong.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution And For Settlement Of The First And Final Account
Off Calendar Aug-06-2008 Continued To Dec-03-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Continued To Aug-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch (Administrator). Marilyn Young for and with Julie Talcott. Lila Talcott in Pro Per.

Ms. Rasch stated that the parties went to mediation, but that the matter did not settle and requested a three week continuance so that the parties could seek litigation counsel. The matter was continued to August 6, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution And For Settlement Of The First And Final Account
Off Calendar Jul-16-2008 Continued To Aug-06-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Mediation
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Continued To Jul-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Petition For Final Distribution And For Settlement Of The First And Final Account
Off Calendar Jul-02-2008 Continued To Jul-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-16-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for and with Debra Dolch. Marilyn Young for Julia Talcot-Fuller (Beneficiary).

Lila Travis was not present in Court. Ms. Rasch requested the Court allow the accounting in order to distribute the assets and requested a referral for mediation to resolve the issue regarding losses to the estate. Ms. Young stated that her client was in agreement with the Ms. Rasch's proposal. The Court authorized a preliminary distribution of $60,000.00 to each of the two heirs and granted 75% of the statutory commission in attorneys fees. The Court signed the order referring the matter to mediation which is to be completed by June 18, 2008. Status on mediation is set for July 2, 2008. Ms. Rasch will submit the revised order.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-12-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Mark Bluer appearing for and with petitioner Julie Talcott-Fuller. Kimberly Scherer appearing for and with Lila Talcott-Travis. Mr. Bluer will file an amended petition. Both sides agree to appointment of a neutral person. This petition is off calendar and hearing on 7/19 is also off calendar. The special letters is not extended. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
